description: An image gallery block showing a featured image with a button to view all images in the set, and an optional title and description.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Image gallery with no title or description, just an image and view-all button

props.imageAlt: Her Majesty the Queen and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, arriving at the University.
props.figcaption: Her Majesty the Queen and Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh, arriving at the University.

stories.name: WithTitleAndDescription
stories.description: Image gallery with an optional title and description in the content area

props.figcaption: The kitchen area in a one bedroom property at Shore Court.
props.title: Shore Court

stories.name: NoFigcaption
stories.description: Image gallery without a figcaption on the image

notes: The view-all button uses aria-label 'View all N images' where N is the imageCount prop. The button has data-gallery-trigger='true' which should be hardcoded. The image uses a responsive picture element with multiple source elements for different breakpoints, but since we cannot enumerate all CDN URLs as props, the component renders a simple img element. The figcaption appears only when the image has a caption (present in 36 out of 164 pages). The title and description in .image-gallery__content are optional, present in roughly 35 pages.
